subcodes.first_line: Hallowed praise, sanctified beyond all mention and utterance, befitteth the peerless Beloved Who, through a single breath [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان محبوب بیمانندی را لایق و سزاست که بیک نفحه از نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @education of children; moral education, @the human soul, @transcendence; unknowability of God
